claim: No Stable, workflow-validation, release, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A named process nav contains an ordered list and one aria-current=step; optional progress uses the native element.
semantics.states: Complete, upcoming, current, error, disabled, and reachability remain visible and programmatic.

interaction.keyboard: Reachable steps use native buttons; static and blocked steps remain non-interactive spans.
interaction.linear: Linear mode permits prior steps and at most the next step; nonlinear mode permits all enabled steps.
interaction.touch: Step controls meet preferred target size and labels reflow vertically.

enhancementIsolation.progressFalse: No progress element, label, value, or semantics exists.
enhancementIsolation.summaryOmitted: No formatter call or output exists.
enhancementIsolation.announcementFalse: No live region, status role, or announcement text exists.

preferences.forcedColors: Markers, connectors, current state, and focus use system colors.

limitations: Source-present-unreleased records do not include generated parity, packed consumers, or manual assistive-technology evidence.
Validation and route authorization remain consumer responsibilities.
